---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Hermes OS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: rusik69
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include details about:
- New kernel subsystem, driver, or syscall
- Filesystem support, networking protocol, or hardware driver
- Userspace command, shell improvement, or tooling
- Build system, testing, or documentation enhancement

## Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## How would this benefit the project?
Explain why this feature would be useful for the OS and its users.

## Implementation hints (optional)
If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented:
- Relevant source directories (`src/kernel/`, `src/drivers/`, `src/fs/`, etc.)
- Similar existing features to use as reference
- External specifications or standards (e.g., RFCs, ACPI specs, PCIe specs)

## Additional context
Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
